ConnectOne Power API
Example 2
Request
http:// 172.16.2.99/ConnectOneUrl/SendXml/SendSmsXml?data=
<MESSAGE VER="1.2">
<USER USERNAME="xxxx" PASSWORD="xxxx" DLR="0"/>
<SMS TEXT="093909010917093E092E093E002000200939094B00200917092F093E" ID="2"
PRTY="2" TYPE =”2”>
<ADDRESS FROM=" Sender2" TO="919986102384" SEQ="1" CUST_MID="12347"/>
<ADDRESS FROM=" Sender2" TO="919243201476" SEQ="2"/>
</SMS>
</MESSAGE>
Response
<MESSAGEACK>
<RESPONSE ID="1" SEQ="1" MSGID="12347" STATUS="Success" />
<RESPONSE ID="2" SEQ="2" MSGID="11111" STATUS="Success" />
</MESSAGEACK>
Note : STATUS="Success"  denotes successful submission to the gateways through configured
